sections.title: Attempting to bank with runes the player does not have

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have the necessary runes with you at this time, so I can't allow you to access your account. Please bring twenty runes of one type and you can open your account.

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: Well met, fellow adventurer! How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: How frightfully rude of me, my dear [chap/lady]. My name is Eniola and I work for that most excellent enterprise, the Bank of Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you work for the bank, what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: My presence here is the start of a new enterprise of travelling banks.

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: I, and others like me, will provide you with the convenience of having banking facilities where they will be of optimum use to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So...what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: The Z.M.I., that is, the Zamorakian Magical Institute, requested my services upon discovery of this altar. We at the Bank of Gielinor are a neutral party and are willing to offer our services regardless of affiliation.

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: So that is why I am here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I access my bank account by speaking to you?

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: Of course, dear [sir/lady].

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: However, I must inform you that because the Z.M.I. are paying for my services, they require anyone not part of the Institute to pay an access fee to open their bank account.

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: But, as our goal as travelling bankers is to make our customers' lives more convenient, we have accomodated to your needs. We know you will be busy creating runes and do not wish to carry money with you. The

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: charge to open your account is the small amount of twenty of one type of rune. The type of rune is up to you.

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: Would you like to pay the price of twenty runes to open your bank account?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the runes on me. Let me open my account and then I'll give them to you.

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: It's not that I don't trust you, old [chap/girl], but as the old adage goes: 'Payment comes before friends.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's preposterous! I'm not paying runes to withdraw my own stuff.

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: I'm sorry to hear that, [sir/madam]. If you should reconsider, because I believe this service offers excellent value for money, do not hesitate to contact me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I would like to set up a quick payment deal.

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: Oh that is most wonderful you know. Let me know which rune you would like to set up a quick payment with.

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: Very well! Whenever you use my services in future, I will take twenty of your lovely [selected type] runes! Assuming you have enough of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I don't have enough, and how do I cancel this deal?

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: I will simply ask you to select a payment the old fashioned way my dear [sir/lady]. To cancel, simply come talk to me again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to talk to you about our quick payment deal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have forgotten which rune I am using for quick payments...

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: Oh you are a silly one! You told me you wanted to pay with [selected type] runes!

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: Would you like to cancel our deal [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I would like to cancel our quick payment deal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I would like to cancel our quick payment deal.

lines.speaker: Eniola
lines.text: Very well, if you would like to set up another deal, just come ask me again.
